reviews.review_description: I didnt like learning salsa but with this app showing foot position and a simple metronome beat makes it simple for beginners to visually learn. If there's anything i would add so far would be a timer option to track how long person has been dancing the same steps.
Pls add more steps !

This app is like having a salsa teacher in your room.
The UI is clear, the moves are fun, and I actually feel like I'm dancing (instead of just moving awkwardly).
Perfect for someone like me who's too shy for real dance classes.
I just wish there was more variety in the music — the rhythm is great, but it gets a bit repetitive.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank your for your feedback. We're happy to hear you're enjoying Salsa XR. Thanks for sharing your thoughts about the music: this looks like something we should work on in the future updates of Salsa XR.

reviews.review_description: Wow, Salsa XR is such an incredibly fun and exhilarating way to practice dancing! I absolutely love how I can slow down or speed up the lessons depending on how I’m feeling – it's fantastic! Honestly, the only thing that would make it even more awesome is if the app gave more detailed feedback on how I’m performing. That would be truly amazing!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! We will think on how we can give more feedback via app, but please keep in mind that Salsa XR is not a replacement for live training in class with real teacher, but ultimate tool for you to master and perfect basic moves at home, with your own pace. Thank you again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Solid 5 stars 💃🕺. Salsa XR is fun 💞, and I love that I can customize the avatar, move it around my room, break the movements down into smaller elements. I’m really into dancing, so I hope the developers include more dance styles into the app.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We thinking about Tango and other rhythm dances where basic steps is a thing. Great that you discovered teacher position feature! By the way, if you turn the instructor so that their back is facing you and stand behind them, it will be much easier for you to follow their movements!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve completed the tutorial and repeated it multiple times, but when I click on the warm-up and dance steps, it does not work.
No response at all. 
I’ve tried uninstalling and reinstalling the app- same results. I am using a meta-quest 3 . Very disappointed. 

Update, per the developers request. , I reinstalled the app and tried again. Same issue after the tutorial. Nothing works at all, I click on the step cards and nothing happens

developer_response.body: Hi Francine, thank you so much for staying in touch with us. We really want to make your experience with Salsa XR positive; to do so, we need to learn more about your issue with the app. Please contact us via alex@jet.style or let us know how we can connect with you.

reviews.review_title: It is fixed and works well now.
reviews.review_description: Originally it was not working but now it does after latest update. I love it.

developer_response.body: We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying the app now! We're doing our best to give you the best experience with Salsa XR. Thank you so much for updating the review: it means the world to us. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I'm surprised there's just a handful of reviews, I'm loving it so far, I went from not knowing a step to actually enjoying the process now. Thanks to the developers! Kudos to the team that made this possible
Great experience, well-thought-out experience, super simple end really enjoyable. For a foreigner in Colombia, this was very handy haha
Definitely works. Can't wait to get back on it

developer_response.body: Glad to hear that! Please update app ( there was an update on Jan 17th)

reviews.review_title: Step by step to dance mastery
reviews.review_description: Nice warm-up, very accessible guide for basic moves: monkey see—monkey do approach always works well for me!
This is absolutely fantastic. Can't wait for more content (dances etc)
Learn all the basics in the privacy of your own home before hitting the dance floor!  So fun!

Difficult to change from each dance step
Great you can move the avatar to show you steps make it sep by step quicker slower 
Move your steps
There’s different avatars
A free dance to put moves together
Could do with help putting moves together as I can do individual moves but 
When you can dance with avatar all goes to for me and puts me off
Really go fun
Tutorial works, but that's it.

developer_response.body: Hola! We’ve identified the cause of the issue and updated the app (last Friday), so everything should be working fine now. It would be great if you could give the app another chance, and if everything works well, we’d really appreciate it if you could update your review. 😊

reviews.review_description:
This VR experience provides an immersive space for users to learn and practice salsa moves in a virtual environment.  While the game is not fully polished yet, it already delivers a well-rounded experience.

The current version includes basic salsa steps and combinations, guiding the user through rhythm and body movements. However, to truly maximize its potential, the developers I think need to introduce more variations in dance styles, incorporate more complex moves, and add the option for different skill levels.

If these enhancements are made, this VR application has the potential to become an excellent tool for learning dances, providing a cost-effective, accessible, and highly engaging way to practice from home.
Didn't work at all.  Can not click on any of the lessons. I can make it thru the introduction but when I try to select any lesson, it does not do anything.

developer_response.body: Hola! We’ve identified the cause of the issue and updated the app, so everything should be working fine now. It would be great if you could give the app another chance, and if everything works well, we’d really appreciate it if you could update your review. 😊

reviews.review_description: Love it! Feels like you're learning to dance just like in real life. Very easy and fun to play

I was excited to ok try this app, but it doesn't work. Got through the tutorial, and then nothing else worked. None of  the dance step options actually worked. Very disappointed. Going on vacation in March and was hoping to learn the basics.

developer_response.body: Really sorry for your disappointment! We’ve identified the cause of the issue and updated the app, so everything should be working fine now. It would be great if you could give the app another chance, and if everything works well, we’d really appreciate it if you could update your review. 😊

reviews.review_description: I guess I am on the same boat as other reviewers. I am clicking away on the different steps and nothing is happening.

developer_response.body: Hola! We’ve identified the cause of the issue and updated the app, so everything should be working fine now. It would be great if you could give the app another chance, and if everything works well, we’d really appreciate it if you could update your review. 😊
